description: [sort] - Sort lines of text files. Sourced directly from Linux Journey curriculum foundations.

commands.description: Alphabetically sort the contents of a file
commands.explanation: Executes the sort routine logically to process: alphabetically sort the contents of a file

commands.description: Numerically sort the contents of a file
commands.explanation: Executes the sort routine logically to process: numerically sort the contents of a file
Executes the sort routine logically to process: reverse the sort order

commands.description: Sort the file explicitly by the second column
commands.explanation: Executes the sort routine logically to process: sort the file explicitly by the second column
